hypothesis: On GER40 M15 during European session, a close above Donchian(20) high with ATR-expansion momentum continues for at least 2R when ADX(14)>22 and ATR percentile>0.50.

signal.entry_long: close > donchian_high(20, shift=1) AND close > ema(50) AND (high-low) > 0.8 * ATR(14)
signal.entry_short: close < donchian_low(20, shift=1) AND close < ema(50) AND (high-low) > 0.8 * ATR(14)

notes: Donchian breakout filtered by trend + volatility regime. Avoids Asia flat hours for GER40.
